dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8503 IH: Save SNAP Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Figures (for himself, Mrs. Beatty, Mr. Thompson of Mississippi, Ms. Sewell, and Ms. Bynum) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To ensure that the Federal share of the supplemental nutrition assistance program allotment costs shall be mandatory if a State cannot pay the applicable State share of applicable allotment costs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Save SNAP Act of 2026.
Section 4(a) of the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 (7 U.S.C. 2013(a)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (3) by striking The Secretary by inserting the following:
by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.text: Notwithstanding subparagraph (A), if a State cannot pay the applicable State cost share in paragraph (2)(B)(i) for any reason—

clause.text: the Secretary shall pay for the full cost of an allotment described in paragraph (1) for any fiscal year; and
paragraph (2) shall not apply with respect to such State for such fiscal year.

section.text: This Act and the amendments made by this Act shall take effect on October 1, 2026.
